description: Add a Patent reference to the Jurism library for 'Device, method, and graphical user interface for unlocking a device by performing gestures on an unlock image'. Include the following details: Inventor Freddy A. Anzures, Assignee Apple Inc., Patent Number US 8046721 B2, and Date 2011-10-25. Ensure the item type is set to 'Patent' and the creator role is 'Inventor'.
